name: PCL H200 (2 nodes x 4 H200 NVL)
description: Lab partition 'pcl_h200': one dual-socket Xeon Platinum 8580 (2x60-core Emerald Rapids) server with 2048 GB DDR5-4400 and 8 NVIDIA H200 NVL GPUs (2x 4 with quad NVLink Bridge). Modeled as two nodes, one per socket, each with 4 H200 NVL GPUs and 1024 GB of DDR5 node memory. Used to produce grounding measurements against the simulator.

network.notes: ESTIMATE - scale-up modeled point-to-point (no congestion/topology): H200 NVL quad NVLink Bridge ~900 GB/s GPU-to-GPU within a 4-GPU group at ~1 us; in-node CPU memory over PCIe5 x16-class CXL ~64 GB/s at ~300 ns. Tune to measured fabric numbers.
